transcript.clean_text: the individual time trial at the torello adriatico always defines the race this time however the time trial starting off proceedings the first of seven stages ultimately ending in san benedetto del tronto usually the venue for exactly this a straight time trial using the coast road a turn at the halfway point and then back for glory the first awarding of the blue jersey would take place today but upon whose shoulders would it rest a big question with pippo garner here and many other good time trialists how would it pan out well the benchmark had been set by alex dowsett the only rider to go under 16 minutes and terry gegenhart set off determined to make his mark and indeed potentially build himself some bragging rights within a team where the leader is not yet clear degenhart coming home 17 seconds in arrears of doubt its benchmark time how long would it stand well does it sat in the hot seat for over two hours when casper ascreen set off the great dane spectacular time trials that he is great power and on this course that was the perfect combination 60 kilometers is his usual effective distance this very much shorter just shy of 14 kilometers but he was finding his minutemen out there and this was going to be a good time how good however well in the end it was good enough to beat alex dowsett relief after two hours in the hot seat he could finally go and warm up well the roof will smile from him but the big guns were still to come garner evan nepal and telly picacho himself still to take on the course the rainbow stripes tell a story that pivo ghana is usually the hero when it comes to time trialling he has come unstuck at this very race in the past not living up to the billing well this was anything but with benign conditions not very much wind and constant throughout the day people gonna set off zigzagging around all of the manholes it didn't look particularly pretty and in fact when he made the big turn he almost clipped the barriers going through such was his determination to hit every single one of the apexes he himself was finding riders out on the road and this was clearly going to be the time to beat ghana's time was absolutely exceptional though sooner had casper a screen taken the hot seat then it was stolen by pippa ghana and by a very handsome margin 24 seconds to the good it looked like he owned the place well also out on course remco ever nepal his time good enough for second place he was two seconds down at the split turn it round to drift to 11 seconds teleport catcher then wearing number one the defending champion the last off the ramp closing out proceedings and indeed closing out all the opposition as he has done over the last few days and indeed the last few seasons strada bianchi on saturday he went on a 49 kilometer solo break did he leave anything behind on the mountains well here he looked imperious and amongst those who will be gunning for the title in the end he looked in a class of his own not enough you understand to beat the likes of ghana or indeed ever nepal but certainly good enough to cause a great deal of worry for those who would win the title danny pagatja coming home and looking like a champion in waiting however the blue jersey will be worn by pippogana he taking the day ahead of ever nepal teleport catcher rounding out the podium at screen and fourth and alex douse it an amazing time from early on finishing fifth two days of sprinting are to come before the terrain starts to roll pippogana is rocking great work by the great italian he'll be a superb support rider into the mountains and there's a few lumps and bumps even though it's a sprinting day as we head 219 kilometers to south chile some nasty peaks to test the legs but it should be the fast men that have some fun and with a great sprinting roster this race will provide yet another dramatic chapter it always does the toreno adriatico is underway you
